news.headline: Fiber Broadband Association announces June 4 State Broadband Summit at Fiber Connect 2025 to discuss state-level broadband policy impact.
news.summary: In Washington, the Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) revealed that The State Broadband Summit is set to take place at Fiber Connect on June 4. This summit will delve into the effects of broadband policy on a state level, particularly how it relates to the NTIA BEAD program as state broadband offices commence practical implementation. The State Broadband Summit, happening at Fiber Connect 2025, aims to convene the full spectrum of the fiber broadband sector to strategize on the way forward. Its focus is to dispel misunderstandings, tackle prevalent issues, and foster collaboration within the industry.

news.headline: Tesla 1Q deliveries 336,681, est. 390,343 $TSLA
SAS Global Academic Programs awards honor educators for achievements in data and AI. Recognizes recipients of 2025 Educator Award for dedication and leadership.
news.summary: CARY, North Carolina, April 2, 2025 - A global leader in data and AI, SAS, has announced the winners of the 2025 SAS Educator Award. This prestigious award is designated to educators who have demonstrated remarkable commitment to their students and displayed exemplary leadership in the field. The recipients are recognized for their outstanding contributions to the education sector, with a focus on data and AI. The award celebrates their significant efforts in shaping the next generation of professionals in this industry.

news.headline: Pulmuone celebrates Earth Month with limited-edition packaging for core brands like Nasoya, promoting plant-based proteins.
news.summary: A prominent tofu manufacturer in America is urging customers to incorporate plant-based proteins into their diet in April. Pulmuone, the world's largest tofu producer and creator of popular brands Nasoya, is promoting this initiative in honor of Earth Month. The company is based in AYER, Mass. and FULLERTON, Calif. The announcement was made on April 2, 2025, through PRNewswire. Pulmuone's products are renowned across the nation and globally, encouraging individuals to opt for sustainable and healthy alternatives.

news.headline: Dreame launches R10 Pure cordless vacuum under $200 - powerful, modern design for small spaces.
news.summary: Introducing the R10 Pure, a cordless vacuum from Dreame Technology offering outstanding power, sleek design, and high-quality cleaning at a budget-friendly price. The latest innovation from the smart home cleaning pioneer is tailored for small spaces. The official launch took place in New York on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Colleen Rothschild Beauty's Bio-Azure Replenishing Oil wins Best Hydrating Face Oil in 2025 NewBeauty Awards.
news.summary: In Dallas on April 2, 2025, Colleen Rothschild Beauty revealed that their top-selling Bio-Azure Replenishing Oil was named the Best Hydrating Face Oil in the 2025 NewBeauty Awards. This recognition, a highly esteemed honor in the beauty sector, highlights the oil's exceptional hydrating properties.

news.headline: Vail Resorts named one of America's Most Trustworthy Companies by Newsweek for 3rd year, based on survey of 25,000 respondents.
news.summary: In Broomfield, Colorado, Vail Resorts (NYSE: MTN) has been named one of America's Most Trustworthy Companies by Newsweek for the third year in a row. The recognition for 2025 stems from a survey of over 25,000 U.S. participants. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to trustworthiness and reliability.

news.headline: Opsera raises $20M for AI-powered DevOps, sees 200% revenue growth post Series A+, adds AI integrations for developer experience.
news.summary: Opsera has achieved a remarkable 200% increase in revenue after securing Series A+ funding, and has broadened its Unified Insights by integrating AI code assistants to enhance the developer experience. This update was announced in San Francisco on April 2, 2025. Opsera, renowned for its AI-Powered DevOps platform, serves as a valuable asset to leading Fortune 1000 firms.

news.headline: APX Lending granted exemptive relief from registration and prospectus requirements by Canadian Securities Administrators in landmark decision on April 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Toronto on April 2, 2025, APX Lending has revealed that the Canadian Securities Administrators (CSA) have approved a groundbreaking decision. This exemption, granted on April 1, 2025, allows the company relief from specific registration and prospectus obligations.

news.headline: Carrum Health expands to offer 1,000+ locations within 50 miles, managing 40% employer medical spend.
news.summary: Carrum Health has expanded its value-based Centers of Excellence (COE) model to over 1,000 locations and now oversees 40% of employer medical expenditure. By customizing the model for various specialties, Carrum aims to enhance its impact in managing healthcare costs. This development was announced in San Francisco on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Zencoder launches AI coding & testing agents with 20+ integrations for developers; promising faster software development.
news.summary: Cutting-edge AI assistants called "Pair Programmers" with over 20 integrations have been released by Zencoder in CAMPBELL, Calif., on April 2, 2025. The new AI coding and unit testing agents are tailored to speed up software development for various platforms such as VS Code, JetBrains, and JIRA.

news.headline: Softheon adds Darnell Dent and Charles Stellar to Board of Directors, experts in healthcare technology.
news.summary: With years of expertise, Darnell Dent and Charles Stellar have joined the healthcare technology firm in STONY BROOK, N.Y. On April 2, 2025, Softheon announced as a top cloud-based platform for health plans, brokers, and member management, offering services like shopping, eligibility, enrollment, and billing.

news.headline: enCore Energy (EU) sells New Mexico assets amidst fraud allegations. Divesting its uranium projects due to legal challenges.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, enCore Energy Corp. (NASDAQ: EU), a company specializing in uranium extraction and known as "America's Clean Energy Company," made a significant decision to divest its New Mexico uranium projects. This strategic move comes as the company faces increasing legal obstacles and a noticeable shift in the market.

news.headline: Axiad named to Cyber 66 list of hottest cybersecurity companies for innovative solutions, boosting security.
news.summary: A company based in San Jose, California, Axiad, known for its innovative solutions in identity risk management and authentication for maximum security, has recently been recognized for its efforts. The global identity security leader was honored as one of the hottest entities in this sector on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: GroupSense introduces standalone executive tabletop exercise service to help organizations combat ransomware risks effectively.
news.summary: GroupSense, a company based in Arlington, Virginia, has introduced a new service called Customized Ransomware Tabletop (TTX) to enhance security measures. This service aims to improve incident response and ensure quick and effective action in the event of attacks. The announcement was made on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Celigo introduces API Builder for easy API development, enhancing its API Management capabilities for composite services.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Celigo, a modern iPaaS platform based in San Mateo, California, introduced API Builder. This new tool marks a significant advancement in low-code composite service creation and augments Celigo's comprehensive API Management features. API Builder facilitates the development of composite services through a user-friendly graphical interface, making the process of creating complex APIs more straightforward. By seamlessly integrating with Celigo's existing API Management tools, API Builder enhances the platform's ability to provide a wide range of tools for secure API management. This development showcases Celigo's commitment to innovation and simplifying the process of creating and managing APIs.

news.headline: Elastic released Elastic Distributions of OpenTelemetry (EDOT) for SREs and developers, with fully open OTel collector and SDKs.
news.summary: Elastic, a Search AI Company listed on the NYSE as ESTC, has recently made public the launch of Elastic Distributions of OpenTelemetry (EDOT). This release includes a comprehensive distribution of the OpenTelemetry (OTel) collector and software development kits (SDKs) for code instrumentation. EDOT aims to offer site reliability engineers (SREs) and developers a reliable OTel ecosystem, supported by enterprise-grade assistance, for enhanced infrastructure and application performance.

news.headline: Contrast Security shifts to channel-first strategy to accelerate growth, expanding partner program for global adoption of security solutions.
news.summary: A company based in Pleasanton, California, Contrast Security, known for its expertise in Application Detection and Response (ADR), has announced a transition towards a channel-first approach. This strategic shift aims to expedite the worldwide integration of its advanced application security offerings. The adjustment involves a substantial enhancement of its partner program, elevating collaborative go-to-market initiatives. Furthermore, it will empower a broader array of solution providers to offer unparalleled application security solutions to enterprises on a global scale.

news.headline: UH partners with Qure.ai for AI chest X-ray to detect lung cancer early, FDA-cleared qXR-LN used as second read.
news.summary: University Hospitals Cleveland Medical Center (UH) in New York has partnered with healthcare AI innovator Qure.ai to implement qXR-LN, an FDA-approved chest X-ray AI solution. This collaboration aims to assist in the early detection of lung cancers by serving as a second opinion to radiologists' evaluations of patient chest X-rays for potential lung nodules. The introduction of this AI system will aid in identifying suspicious nodules and contribute to future AI research initiatives.

news.headline: Stonebranch introduced Universal Portal for enterprise-wide automation access, empowering users with user-friendly self-service automation.
news.summary: Today, Stonebranch, a prominent service orchestration and automation solutions provider, unveiled the Universal Portal in Alpharetta, Georgia. This innovative launch aims to provide end-users with user-friendly self-service automation regardless of their expertise or location, accessible from any device. Serving as an adjunct to Universal Automation Center (UAC), the Universal Portal offers an alternative approach to interacting with automation processes within UAC. By empowering citizen automators and developers alike, this solution enhances automation capabilities for all users.

news.headline: NIQ released a report projecting global Consumer Tech & Durables sales to hit $1.29 trillion by 2025, driven by innovation.
news.summary: NielsenIQ (NIQ), a prominent consumer intelligence firm, unveiled its Consumer Tech Industry Trends 2025 report, predicting that global sales in Consumer Tech & Durables will hit $1.29 trillion. This surge is projected to be fueled by emerging markets, replacement cycles, and premium innovation in the upcoming year. Julian Baldwin, the Global President of NIQ, emphasized that to thrive in 2025 and beyond, it is imperative for manufacturers and retailers to prioritize value with genuine innovation that aligns with the values of today's purpose-driven consumers.

news.headline: Waffle House introduces delivery for the first time, via Olo's Dispatch at select locations, offering late-night delivery for iconic menu items.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, Waffle House enthusiasts can now have their beloved dishes brought directly to their homes for the first time. The renowned 24/7 diner chain has introduced "Late Night Delivery" at chosen venues via Dispatch from Olo (NYSE:OLO), a prominent restaurant technology firm. This service provides a convenient way for customers to savor popular items such as the Classic Waffle, scattered, smothered & covered hashbrowns, and the All-Star Special from the coziness of their homes. Waffle House's initiative has successfully launched, revolutionizing the dining experience for its loyal patrons.

news.headline: DoubleVerify makes strategic investment in FirstPartyCapital to drive adtech innovation, reinforcing commitment to industry.
news.summary: In London, FirstPartyCapital (FPC), a venture capital firm focusing on adtech, martech, and digital media, has received a strategic investment from DoubleVerify, a premier software platform for digital media analytics. This move enhances FPC's goal of backing scalable ad tech startups worldwide and reinforces DoubleVerify's dedication to innovating digital advertising. This investment signifies a significant step for both companies in advancing their respective roles in the industry.

news.headline: Hiya extends partnership with Samsung through 2028, empowering Smart Call on millions of Samsung devices.
news.summary: Today, Hiya, a leading voice intelligence company, revealed the expansion of its partnership with Samsung until 2028. This collaboration involves Hiya providing its services for Samsung Smart Call to combat spam and fraud calls. Additionally, Hiya will offer Hiya Connect, which allows businesses to connect with a larger customer base on numerous Samsung devices worldwide. The partnership aims to deliver top-notch solutions to users globally and enhance their experience.

news.headline: WellSky introduces new care transition dashboards to equip acute care providers with actionable insights from expanded data sources, transforming case management and driving smarter decision-making.
news.summary: In Overland Park, Kansas, a recent development showcases new dashboards that are now capable of processing data from a wider range of sources. This enhancement aims to provide acute care providers with valuable insights that can be used to improve both clinical and financial results. The expansion allows for a more comprehensive analysis of information, aiding professionals in making informed decisions for better outcomes.

news.headline: SecurityScorecard partners with Willis to enhance cyber risk quantification and improve insurance modeling, strengthening enterprise security worldwide.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, SecurityScorecard revealed a new strategic partnership with Willis, a prominent global advisory, broking, and solutions company. This collaborative effort, which builds on an existing relationship between the two entities, seeks to boost cyber risk quantification, refine insurance modeling, and fortify enterprise security strategies on a global scale. As a key aspect of this partnership, Willis has been appointed as the official insurance broker for SecurityScorecard, showcasing a deepening of their collaboration in this area.

news.headline: Arrow Electronics and Ohmite sign distribution deal to bring Ohmite’s power resistor solutions to Arrow’s global customers. Ohmite, celebrating its 100th anniversary in 2025, serves industries like transportation, industrial, energy, aerospace.
news.summary: Arrow Electronics (NYSE: ARW) and Ohmite have recently formed a distribution partnership in Centennial, Colo. The agreement aims to broaden the availability of Ohmite’s power resistor products to Arrow’s worldwide clientele. This collaboration enables customers to procure Ohmite’s components directly from Arrow. Ohmite, a prominent power resistor manufacturer, is commemorating its upcoming 100th anniversary in 2025. Their products cater to various industries such as transportation, industrial, energy, and aerospace, offering tailored solutions for diverse sectors.

news.headline: X9 introduces forum for reducing check fraud, open to financial industry with focus on collaboration.
news.summary: An initiative has been taken by X9 to establish a Check Fraud Industry Forum in Annapolis, Maryland. The forum aims to bring together various stakeholders from the financial services sector. The platform will be open for participation to all interested parties and organizations within the industry. This move is part of X9's efforts to address the challenges posed by check fraud. The forum will provide a space for collaborative discussions and the sharing of insights on combating fraudulent activities related to checks. This development signifies a step towards enhancing security measures in financial transactions.

news.headline: Securonix sees 40% YoY growth in new annual recurring revenue (ARR) in fiscal 2024, leading to strong momentum for 2025.
news.summary: Securonix, Inc., based in Plano, Texas, revealed a notable increase in sales bookings growth for the year 2024. The company, recognized as a five-time leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for SIEM and a Customers’ Choice in the 2024 Gartner Peer Insights ‘Voice of the Customer,’ reported a 40% year-over-year rise in new annual recurring revenue (ARR) sales. This achievement has set a strong momentum for the business in the upcoming year, positioning Securonix as the exclusive SIEM solution provider to be designated as a Lea.

news.headline: Compute Exchange's auction model has facilitated $1B in compute supply, optimizing AI infrastructure access.
news.summary: Located in Palo Alto, California, Compute Exchange has introduced the world's initial open exchange for AI compute, reshaping the process of buying and selling compute through a unique auction model. The platform conducted its first post-launch auction on February 25th, facilitating transactions exceeding $1 billion in compute supply. This approach highlights the effectiveness of a market-driven strategy in enhancing access to AI infrastructure, improving pricing efficiency, and establishing sustainability standards.

news.headline: CallRail introduces Voice Assist, an AI assistant for lead engagement, ensuring businesses capture more leads 24/7.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company CallRail has unveiled Voice Assist, a new AI assistant leveraging cutting-edge generative AI technology to help businesses effectively engage with customers and capture leads. This innovative tool conducts real-time conversations with callers, completing routine tasks and utilizing advanced voice agent AI and LLMs. The goal is to prevent businesses from missing out on potential leads and enhance the value of each call. With Voice Assist, missed calls can be transformed into valuable opportunities for businesses to connect with customers.

news.headline: Actively AI secures $22.5M in funding from Bain Capital Ventures and First Round Capital for revenue optimization with AI.
news.summary: Actively AI, a company utilizing AI reasoning for revenue teams, has secured $17.5 million in Series A funding. The funding round was spearheaded by Bain Capital Ventures, with participation from First Round Capital, who had previously led a $5 million seed round. Notable angel investors backing the company include Jason Boehmig, co-founder and CEO at Ironclad; Ali Rowghani, ex-managing partner at Y Combinator and COO at Twitter; and Frederic Kerrest, vice chairman and co-founder at Okta. Altogether, Actively has raised a substantial amount in investments.

news.headline: NinjaOne appoints John Sapone as Chief Revenue Officer with 20 years of experience in leading revenue teams.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, NinjaOne®, an automated endpoint management platform, has named John Sapone as its new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). With over 20 years of experience in leading revenue teams at high-growth companies such as Snowflake, ServiceNow, Data Domain, and Nimble Storage, Sapone will now oversee global revenue teams at NinjaOne, aiming to sustain the company's growth and enhance customer success. Dean Yeck will be transitioning to another role within the company.

news.headline: Page Trucking partners with ReVolt for extended-range electric trucks, aiming 40% fuel savings; initially 5 trucks to follow up with 15 more.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Page Trucking, a renowned name in specialized transportation, has made headlines by becoming the inaugural fleet customer to embrace the extended-range electric trucks manufactured by ReVolt Motors. These innovative trucks boast impressive statistics including about 40% fuel savings and reduced emissions, especially targeted for specific applications. Cementing their partnership, ReVolt Motors is gearing up to provide an initial delivery of five Peterbilt 579 trucks outfitted with their unique dual power system. Furthermore, there are plans for an additional 15 units to be sent out subsequently, showing the deepening commitment of Page Trucking to eco-friendly solutions.

news.headline: CareCloud acquires RevNu Medical Management in second acquisition in 31 days, expanding audiology RCM services.
news.summary: Somerset, New Jersey- CareCloud, Inc. (Nasdaq: CCLD, CCLDO), a prominent provider of practice management and healthcare technology, disclosed its acquisition of RevNu Medical Management, an upcoming audiology-centered revenue cycle management firm in Westminster, California. This strategic move reflects CareCloud’s commitment to expanding its services and reach in the medical industry nationwide. The announcement was made on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Nearly 75% of performance marketers see diminishing returns on social ad spend; 50% expanding to other channels.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Taboola, a prominent company in providing effective advertising solutions worldwide, revealed a recent study conducted in collaboration with Qualtrics, a top player in experience management partnering with around 20,000 businesses globally.

news.headline: AMTD secures "ART OF LUXURY" trademark registrations, protects intellectual property. Successful in classes under Nice Classification.
news.summary: AMTD Group Inc. and The Generation Essentials Group, under AMTD Digital, have officially registered the ART OF LUXURY trademark. The registration includes various classes under the International Classification of Goods and Services, specifically Class 9. This joint announcement signifies a significant milestone for the companies in securing their intellectual property rights.

news.headline: C3is Inc. reveals reverse stock split plan, consolidating shares at ratio of 1:5 to improve stock value.
Nicole Y. Lamb-Hale appointed as Chief Administrative Officer and Corporate Secretary of Cummins Inc. Effective June 1, succeeding Sharon Barner.
news.summary: In Columbus, Indiana, Cummins Inc. (NYSE: CMI) revealed the appointment of Nicole Y. Lamb-Hale as the Chief Administrative Officer and Corporate Secretary starting June 1. Lamb-Hale will take over from Sharon Barner, who retires on May 31. Jennifer Rumsey, Cummins Inc.'s Chair and CEO, praised Lamb-Hale for her expertise in corporate and international law, regulatory compliance, and trade policy. Lamb-Hale's strategic mindset and vision make her a valuable addition to the team.

news.headline: US military orders $2.5M worth of LRADs from Genasys Communication Systems for Army, Navy, and Air Force units.
news.summary: San Diego-based company recently announced new orders for LRADs (Long Range Acoustic Devices) from various military branches, including the Army, Navy, and Air Force. The orders encompass units based in the US as well as overseas, indicating a widespread demand for these devices among military personnel. This development highlights the importance of LRADs in enhancing communication and security capabilities, with the exact number of units ordered not disclosed.

news.headline: Seedtag introduces AI Intention Models for targeted advertising. Increases effectiveness for high-intent audiences.
news.summary: Seedtag, a top player in contextual advertising, has unveiled its AI Intention Models in New York on April 2, 2025. This innovation aims to enhance marketing strategies by effectively engaging high-intent audiences through privacy-first advertising. This move signifies the company's commitment to leveraging advanced technology to cater to the needs of its users, ensuring a seamless experience.

news.headline: Callan JMB (NASDAQ: CJMB) to be at LD Micro Invitational in NYC, April 9-10, 2025, for healthcare logistics.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Callan JMB INC. (NASDAQ: CJMB), a logistics company supporting healthcare and emergency services, shared plans for its management team to attend the LD Micro Invitational in New York City on April 9-10, 2025. Callan JMB offers fulfillment, storage, monitoring, and cold chain logistics services. The LD Micro Invitational will provide a platform for the company to engage with investors and showcase its operations.

news.headline: 2024 Olympic Gold Medalist Caroline Marks endorses Pro Balance Resistance Bands with pro surfer Lakey Peterson and DWTS judge Rachel White.
news.summary: In San Clemente, California on April 2, 2025, Probalancebands.com has excitedly revealed the endorsement of prominent figures in the sports and entertainment world. The lineup includes the 2024 Olympic Gold Medalist and 2023 World Surfing Champion, Caroline Marks, along with pro surfer Lakey Peterson, and Rachel White, a judge on Dancing with the Stars. These accomplished individuals will now be promoting the brand.

news.headline: Gary Evee appointed as Chairman of the Board by Aware. New strategic leader, overseeing key decisions and direction.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has decreased to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past six months. This drop in unemployment follows the creation of 431,000 new jobs in the month of September, exceeding economists' expectations. The labor force participation rate also saw an increase to 61.9%, showing positive signs of more individuals actively seeking employment. The decreasing unemployment rate and growth in job creation suggest a strengthening labor market in the country.

news.headline: Pluralsight report shows 79% of tech workers fake AI knowledge; 91% of C-Suite execs admitting to exaggeration.
news.summary: According to a recent report by Pluralsight, a technology workforce development company, it was found that 91% of C-Suite executives overstate their knowledge about artificial intelligence (AI). Released on April 2, 2025, the second annual AI Skills Report from Pluralsight delves into the AI landscape and its influence on talent. This highlights the significant gap in understanding AI among top-level executives, indicating that there is a substantial amount for them to learn in this field.

news.headline: Monument Mining Limited and Great Boulder Resources sign a Collaboration Agreement for processing ore at Burnakura Mill.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 02, 2025, Monument Mining Limited (TSX-V: MMY and FSE: D7Q1) has announced signing a Memorandum of Understanding with Great Boulder Resources (ASX: GBR) for potential ore processing collaboration. The agreement entails the processing of ore from Great Boulder’s Side Well Gold Project at Monument’s Burnakura Mill in Meekatharra, Western Australia, pending availability.

news.headline: VIP Play, Inc. (OTCQB: VIPZ) expands in the U.S. with interim licenses in West Virginia for Sports Wagering and i-Gaming.
news.summary: In Sarasota, Florida on April 2, 2025, VIP Play, Inc. (OTCQB: VIPZ), a reputable mobile gambling operator in the U.S., has received interim License approval in West Virginia for Sports Wagering and i-Gaming managed services. This development marks a significant step forward for VIP Play as it expands its operations in key gaming markets.

news.headline: Virtualware USA and HTC VIVE team up with UCF for XR lab installation in Orlando, FL, enhancing sim training.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Virtualware and HTC VIVE disclosed a new partnership with the University of Central Florida (UCF)’s Institute for Simulation and Training (IST) in Orlando, FL and Basauri, Spain. This collaboration will establish a cutting-edge immersive laboratory, facilitating cooperation between researchers, government entities, and industrial firms utilizing XR technologies. This initiative aims to enhance collaboration and innovation through shared resources and advanced technology.

news.headline: Taiko introduces DAO Security Council with top Ethereum projects to address security issues. Launching soon.
news.summary: The Security Council for DAO located in London and Singapore will proactively address security concerns. On April 2, 2025, Taiko, the pioneer based rollup, revealed the Security Council members of its DAO, signifying progress towards its complete implementation and setting a new benchmark.

news.headline: SHEIN is back as fashion sponsor at Stagecoach for 4th year in a row. California's Country festival ready in style!
news.summary: Get ready to strut your stuff at Stagecoach: California's Country festival with SHEIN, the renowned online fashion and lifestyle retailer. After partnering for three successful years, SHEIN is back as the official fashion sponsor for the fourth consecutive year. This partnership is set to elevate festival-goers' style game to the next level. The event is scheduled for April 2, 2025, in Los Angeles, promising a fantastic celebration of all things country. Stay tuned for the latest trends and styles SHEIN will be bringing to the festival scene.
